## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Abby Curtis to discuss potential job opportunities at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Abby has 10+ years in digital marketing, specializing in SEO and content strategy since 2018](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [fwd.digital is rapidly growing (38 clients, $6M revenue) and hiring for roles like Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Abby's ideal comp range: $120-130k; open to new opportunities due to frustrations in current role](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Next step: Marcel to introduce Abby to Kyle (VP of Growth) for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

## Topics

### Abby's Background and Current Role

  - [10 years in digital marketing, focused on SEO since 2018](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Current role: Content strategy, SEO, and editorial oversight](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Pivoting to broader content marketing due to org's lack of holistic strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Key responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [Content briefs, keyword research, heading structure recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [Collaborating with email and social media teams on distribution](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [Adapting to algorithm changes and AI impacts on organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Marcel's Background and fwd.digital Overview

  - [Early career at IBM and HP, building content hubs and publications](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Founded fwd.digital, leveraging AI for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Company growth:](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [38 clients, $6M annual revenue (doubled in 7-8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
      - [Recently raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [Publishing \~20M words/month for clients](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Approach: AI workflows + expert oversight for quality and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

### Abby's Career Aspirations

  - [Seeking data-driven, strategic environment](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Desires recognition for leadership and strategy work](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Wants collaborative culture focused on mutual success](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Comp range: $120-130k](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### fwd.digital Opportunities

  - [Considering roles like Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Managing 3-5 accounts with small support team](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Exploring specialization in verticals (e.g., healthcare)](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Remote-first, global team with competitive pay](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Abby to Kyle (VP of Growth) for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Potential for quick movement in hiring process if both parties interested](https://fathom.video/share/zDWp97nQnbyp_QMsDn7D2wcPHajnKvAv?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
